Home / Services / Basement Flooring

Basement Flooring

Specialized solutions for Columbus' below-grade spaces.

Ohio basements present unique flooring challenges - from summer humidity to occasional seepage. We've developed specialized solutions that transform these often-underutilized spaces into comfortable living areas.

Our process begins with comprehensive moisture testing using equipment calibrated for Central Ohio's clay soil conditions. For homes near the Olentangy watershed, we often recommend elevated subfloor systems that allow airflow beneath flooring. In Dublin's newer developments, we install dimpled membranes that redirect minor moisture.

Luxury vinyl plank remains our most popular choice, but we also offer ceramic tile with radiant heating for year-round comfort. Every installation includes detailed transition work to upper levels and proper expansion gaps to accommodate seasonal shifts in your home's foundation.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: 72-hour moisture evaluation and pH testing
  2. 02 Step 2: Custom moisture mitigation plan
  3. 03 Step 3: Subfloor preparation specific to basement type
  4. 04 Step 4: Installation with climate-adaptive materials

Benefits

  • Creates usable living space year-round
  • Prevents musty basement odors
  • Warm underfoot even in winter
  • Withstands occasional minor seepage

Frequently Asked Questions

Can you install flooring if my basement has had minor water in the past?

Yes, with proper preparation. We've successfully transformed hundreds of Columbus basements using specialized moisture control systems tailored to each home's history.

How long does basement flooring typically last in our climate?

Our installations average 15-20 years thanks to meticulous preparation. We warranty all basement work for 5 years against climate-related issues.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with basement flooring? Contact us today.
